omment_id":"7486152487129809726","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是我看过最爽的末世文 全程秒天秒地要啥有啥
别的书把规则世界观啥的设定好之后反而成为限制也有可能
而这里我唐哥的规矩才是规矩[大笑] 系统都得给我卷起来[捂脸]
优点说完了来说缺点 还是多数小说的通病 中后期无可避免的走下坡 剧情越来越水反派开始套娃 随着女人越来越多每个人的剧情被分摊 基本上不可能写好的 除非是斩神那种级别的剧情规划 战力系统不算崩吧 算是我看过的书里控制得算好的了 但最后这个结局属实不怎么样 可以说烂尾吧 感觉把读者耍了 嘿其实啥都没有咱们包饺子吧[捂脸]
总的来说这本书还是很不错的 值得一看
作者加油！祝你前程似锦"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743011774,"group_id":"7317525935996013630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8jm8kSblBLoI2SXQqERbRU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"39206800852296","user_name":"繁星舉薦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"39206800852296","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7317525935996013630","book_info":{"abstract":"《杀伐果断+不圣母+美女多+冷酷无情》

末世降临囤物资？

"comment_id":"7399511594757817113","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比一几年那会刚兴起的末世类小说更简单粗暴也更爽，全程开车，前期有点小瑕疵大概是为了塑造人物形象有点急，少了不少支线的衍生，看目前情况有急忙结尾的态度，但是也算在老套末世流里走出了一些新感觉，之前的大量末世文对于心里人性的描述太过于精细，看起来总会觉得有些别扭，文笔方面不占优势，但是末世文真不需要太多的咬文嚼字，这本更黑，也更符合正常逻辑。两天不到看完了，确实爽"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722836725,"group_id":"7317525935996013630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/qyWAne/hGbirkgKjNjYeeuDcbK8XtMyTYbD52CLku/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8182ee6af62f4969885a2f290f39515b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706335&x-signature=hm3kUkXLal5Qq6YV6eBzl9u6D3I%3D","user_id":"3151653014872525","user_name":"KabutoPh"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3151653014872525","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7317525935996013630","book_info":{"abstract":"《杀伐果断+不圣母+美女多+冷酷无情》

ment_id":"7531395001661096766","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，这是我最近3年以来看过的最好看的爽文了[快哭了][快哭了][快哭了][快哭了][快哭了][快哭了]，我想说很多话，但是不知怎么开口，看着唐泽从小区一步步到宇宙，看着书中的一个又一个反转和一些名场面，我都笑的合不拢嘴，但是当这本书真正完结时，我还是感觉有点难过，唐泽也不复存在，我名字里也带着泽字，我对唐泽也就像看着自己的孩子一步步从末世初期到现在，感触很多[哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753545503,"group_id":"7317525935996013630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不以物喜，不以己悲.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7F9YsNyHxfL9U8A5yGeWmDpowF7GHfb+3FmDqhUfVvs","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f6da1dc366464a529f87e585c51bfb0d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706444&x-signature=hJmlT%2F9of8DUKgLYzo9q2Mk%2Bxbk%3D","user_id":"2045505688321703","user_name":"枯桥寄白"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2045505688321703","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7317525935996013630","book_info":{"abstract":"《杀伐果断+不圣母+美女多+冷酷无情》
